title: 01: Accretion Disc
description: A dark signularity at centre encircled by a dense flat particle disc

title: 02: Binary Drift
description: Two red orbs in a mutual orbit, each with its own particle halo

title: 03: Comet Arc
description: A bright red nucleus, its tail fans on multiple layers

title: 04: Crescent Streaks
description: Several crescents tumble through the frame at different sizes and rotations, each trailing fine parallel speed lines

title: 05: Gravity Lens
description: Hundreds of horizontal field lines cross the canvas. A red orb in the centre acting like a gravitational lens

title: 06: Nested Shells
description: Eight concentric elliptical shells of particles, each tilted at a different angle

title: 07: Orbital Rings
description: A red planet surrounded by a family of elliptical arcs

title: 08: Orbit Dust
description: A red orb at the centre surrounded by a ring system built of tiny particles

title: 01: Caldera
description: Ember tiles cooling at the mouth of the volcano

title: 02: Cryolite
description: Glacial half moons stacked like ice shelves

title: 03: Stratum
description: Desert strata carved in rust and bone

title: 04: Coronal
description: Aurora rings blooming in a teal and violet sky

title: 05: Vesper
description: Dusk shapes dissolving into blush and plum

title: 06: Bathyal
description: Midnight geometry adrift in a deep navy sea

title: 01: Pane
description: A study of the gap as a physical mortar holding chalk and graphite leaves in place

title: 02: Quarry
description: A monochromatic investigation into tonal deposits resting on a pale limestone surface

title: 03: Plate
description: An exploration of geological depth achieved through layered ivory rectangles with varying transparency

title: 04: Seam
description: A break in the geometric grid that uses skewed parallelograms to mimic hand-cut stone
